content.text: How do I find a node by ID if it might exist either in the default structure or spread across multiple subgraphs?
If an ID happens to appear in two different graphs within self.all_graphs, which node will this function return?
The function is designed to return the first match it finds during the nested iteration process, meaning the result depends on the order of graphs in your list.
I understand; I guess I need to make sure those IDs are unique across all my graph objects.
